steps.title: Sacrifices that Crack the Shell
steps.text: Sometimes the only way to reach a king is to blast through the pawn shield. The Greek Gift (Bxh7+), Nxf7 sacrifices, and exchange sacrifices on c3/c6 are all classic demolition patterns.

steps.title: When to Demolish
steps.text: The sacrifice works when: (1) you have attacking pieces ready to follow up, (2) the enemy king has no escape squares, (3) the defender can't bring reinforcements in time. Calculate 4-6 moves deep before committing.
